roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT NOTICE OF COMPLETION OF DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED
DEFT NOTICE OF ENROLLMENT TO DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED
DEF MOT TO CORRECT THE SENT MINUTES REGARDING THE FINES & ASSESSMENTFILE

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT SENTENCING MINUTES/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL INDICATES THE MINUTES FROM SENTENCING ON 05-20-19 INCORRECTLY REFLECT A BASE FINEOF $390 PLUS $1131 IN ASSESSMENT FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $1521,/CTORD: BASEFINE AND ASSESMENTS AMENDED TO CONFORM WITH FORM PRU-100 AS FOLLOWS:/ /PF145 18/X:ALL OTHER FINES AND FEES IMPOSED AT SENTENCE ON 05-20-19 REMAIN THESAME,/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CORRECT THE FINES & FEES IN RE: SENTENCE/DAWT/X:THIS PROCEEDING IS NEITHER REPORTED NOR RECORDED/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 20/TRANS20:FORTHWITH FOR SAME/

/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 2D/CTS 2/PF390 18/VF2 150/FOP1 12 HOURS/LVL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN//X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL:DISPOSITION/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADDCOUNT 3, 23103VC, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATEDDISPOSITION/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1//GTWM/X: MVARS PROTECTIVE ORDER IS FILED AND SERVED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DEF: APPEARANCE WAIVED UNLESS DISPO/
/CAL DISPO/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONT/DEF: ORDERED PRESENT IF DISPO/
